allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { Write-Host "后端未启动或无法连接: $_" })

PowerShell($venvPython = "C:\\Users\\dd\\Desktop\\看盘工具\\backend\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; Write-Host "Python venv exists: $\(Test-Path $venvPython\)"; Write-Host "Python version:"; & $venvPython --version 2>&1; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "Checking if MT5 Terminal process is running..."; $mt5 = Get-Process -Name "terminal64" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($mt5\) { Write-Host "MT5 Terminal: RUNNING \(PID: $\($mt5.Id\)\)" } else { Write-Host "MT5 Terminal: NOT RUNNING" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "=== 后端已启动 ==="; Write-Host "MT5 连接: $\($r.data.mt5_connected\)"; Write-Host "Tick同步: $\($r.data.tick_sync_running\)"; Write-Host "今日Tick数: $\($r.data.tick_count_today\)"; Write-Host "最新Tick时间: $\($r.data.last_tick_time\)"; Write-Host "MT5账户: $\($r.data.mt5_account\)"; Write-Host "MT5服务器: $\($r.data.mt5_server\)"; Write-Host "运行时间: $\($r.data.uptime_seconds\)秒" } catch { Write-Host "后端仍在启动中或失败: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/rates/XAUUSD?timeframe=M5&count=260" -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "status: $\($r.status\)"; Write-Host "symbol: $\($r.data.symbol\)"; Write-Host "timeframe: $\($r.data.timeframe\)"; Write-Host "count: $\($r.data.count\)"; if \($r.data.rates.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Host "First candle: $\($r.data.rates[0].time\)"; Write-Host "Last candle: $\($r.data.rates[-1].time\)"; Write-Host "Sample: open=$\($r.data.rates[0].open\) high=$\($r.data.rates[0].high\) low=$\($r.data.rates[0].low\) close=$\($r.data.rates[0].close\)" } else { Write-Host "rates array is EMPTY!" } } catch { Write-Host "API调用失败: $_" })
